subjects.description: A couple of translucent white stray polythene plastic bags on the sand-dusted asphalt, warm-cast and dust-filmed, lightly crumpled and partially inflated by the hot sandy wind
subjects.appearance_details: Thin, semi-transparent plastic taking on a warm sandy cast in the hazy light, filmed with fine dust, edges fluttering and creased, lightly grimed with sand
subjects.relationship: Loose debris on the road ahead of the moving ego vehicle, harmless obstacles being ignored
subjects.location: center foreground to lower-center of frame, on the road ahead
subjects.orientation: Tumbling and shifting, no fixed orientation
subjects.pose: Crumpled and partially lifted, drifting along the asphalt
subjects.action: Being tossed and skittered across the road by gusts of wind
subjects.state_changes: Bags shift position, lift briefly, and tumble as the vehicle approaches and passes near them

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, implied by the first-person dashboard-level point of view, traveling forward along a desert-edge arterial road lane
subjects.appearance_details: Front hood edge faintly visible at the bottom of the frame, windshield framing the view of the road ahead
subjects.relationship: The observer vehicle whose perspective the entire video is shot from
subjects.location: implied at camera position, hood visible lower frame
subjects.orientation: Facing forward down the road, aligned with the camera
subjects.pose: Driving steadily forward in its lane
subjects.action: Maintaining consistent speed and lane position
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; continues straight at constant speed

background_setting: An arterial road on the desert edge of a Middle-Eastern city at hazy midday, wide dry asphalt filmed with fine sand under a warm, dust-hazed sky. Low sand-colored concrete buildings, block walls, and a few palms line the route; a light dust haze softens the sun into a warm sandy glow and blurs the distance. Blowing sand drifts in ribbons across the lanes in the dry-season heat.

lighting.conditions: Hazy midday sun through light dust, warm and diffuse
lighting.direction: High sun diffused by dust haze into a soft warm overhead glow
lighting.shadows: Soft, weak, warm-edged shadows muted by the airborne dust
lighting.illumination_effect: Warm, sandy diffuse light with a hazy glow; the two translucent bags take on a warm sandy cast, softly lit and dust-filmed as they skitter over the sand-dusted asphalt

aesthetics.composition: First-person driving perspective with the arterial vanishing into hazy distance near center, hood edge anchoring the bottom, the two bags in the central foreground
aesthetics.color_scheme: Warm sandy tans and ochres, dust-hazed pale sky, sand-colored buildings, and warm dust-filmed off-white bags
aesthetics.patterns: Ribbons of blowing sand, block walls, and scattered palms along the road

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking shot from the moving vehicle, steady and smooth
cinematography.framing: Wide shot capturing the road ahead
cinematography.focus: The road ahead and the two bags in the central foreground; the dust haze softens the distance

context: Autonomous driving or dashcam scenario demonstrating a vehicle ignoring harmless road debris

actions.description: The ego vehicle drives forward steadily along the hazy desert-edge arterial; two stray polythene bags appear ahead on the sandy asphalt, warm-cast as they flutter in the hot wind.
The vehicle continues at constant speed; the bags tumble and skitter across the sand-dusted road as the gap closes.
The vehicle maintains its lane and speed, passing near the bags without deviation as they drift aside in the sandy wind.

segments.description: Ego vehicle drives forward on the desert-edge arterial under hazy warm midday; two warm-cast polythene bags become visible ahead, tossed by the sandy wind.
segments.key_changes: Bags appear in the central foreground, softly lit and dust-filmed, and begin to flutter.
segments.camera: Smooth forward tracking from dashboard view.

segments.description: The vehicle holds speed and lane as the bags tumble across the sand-dusted road surface.
segments.key_changes: Bags shift and lift in the hot sandy gusts.

segments.description: The vehicle maintains its course and passes near the bags, ignoring them entirely as they drift aside.
segments.key_changes: Bags pass out of central frame; the hazy road ahead stays clear.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the ego vehicle moves steadily forward along a desert-edge arterial road in a Middle-Eastern city at hazy midday, dry asphalt filmed with sand under a warm dust-hazed sky. Within the first two seconds, two translucent polythene bags come into view in the central foreground, warm-cast and softly lit through the dust haze as they lift and flutter. From 0:02 to 0:03 the vehicle holds constant speed and lane position as the bags tumble and skitter across the sand-dusted road. From 0:03 to 0:05 the vehicle continues without deviation, passing near the bags and ignoring them as they drift aside, the arterial ahead remaining clear but hazy in the warm sandy light.
audio_description: Ambient desert-edge city sounds: the hum of the engine and tires over sand-filmed asphalt, a hot dry wind carrying blowing sand, distant traffic and a faint call to prayer. No speech or music; the dry gritty rustle of dust-filmed plastic bags in the wind.
